since_last: 49% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.97%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 49% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.28% · BTC +0.75% · Gold +0.90% · Nasdaq100 +0.27%. 49% of 84 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.97%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.97%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CRNC is the standout at +5.13%
cards.body: Leaders: CRNC +5.13%, TER +3.97%, AMAT +3.94%, KLAC +3.83%, LRCX +3.28%. Laggards: NOW -3.88%, CRM -3.84%, IBM -3.66%, EQIX -3.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.71% at $149.35
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.71% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
